canonical_definition: A few-shot evaluation task where the model must repeat a given sentence, used to test the ability to steer generation when the model's default behavior is to follow a contextual pattern.
papers: Logical Reasoning with Outcome Reward Models for Test-Time Scaling
Will It Still Be True Tomorrow? Multilingual Evergreen Question Classification to Improve TrustworthyQA
